meta.title: Kontent Aura — AI budgeting that runs itself
meta.description: Kontent Aura tracks your spending automatically and builds a budget that adapts to your life — powered by AI. Join the early-access waitlist.

hero.title: Your money, on
hero.subtitle: Kontent Aura connects your accounts, categorizes every transaction, and builds a budget that adapts to how you actually live — all with AI, zero spreadsheets.
hero.note: Free to join · No card required · Leave anytime
hero.cardInsight: You'll save $240 more this month if you keep this pace.

features.title: Everything your budget needs, nothing it doesn't
features.subtitle: Aura does the tedious money work in the background so you can just make good decisions.

autoTrack.title: Automatic tracking
autoTrack.desc: Every transaction is imported and sorted the moment it happens — no manual entry, ever.

aiBudget.title: AI budgets that adapt
aiBudget.desc: Aura learns your habits and rebalances your budget when life changes, not once a year.

insights.title: Insights you'll act on
insights.desc: Plain-language nudges tell you exactly where money leaks and what to do about it.

goals.title: Goals that stick
goals.desc: Set a target and Aura carves out the money automatically, then keeps you on pace.

security.title: Bank-grade security
security.desc: 256-bit encryption, read-only connections, and biometric lock. Your data is never sold.

forecast.title: Cash-flow forecast
forecast.desc: See your balance weeks ahead so a surprise bill never becomes a surprise again.

how.title: Set up once, then forget the spreadsheet
how.subtitle: Three steps and about two minutes.

connect.title: Connect your accounts
connect.desc: Securely link your cards and accounts with read-only access in a couple of taps.

learn.title: Let the AI learn
learn.desc: Aura categorizes your history and drafts a budget tailored to your real spending.

grow.title: Watch your money grow
grow.desc: Get gentle nudges, hit your goals, and see your savings climb month over month.

testimonials.title: Early testers are already hooked
testimonials.subtitle: A few words from people in our private beta.

one.quote: I finally know where my money goes without opening a single spreadsheet. Aura just... handles it.
one.name: Malika R.

two.quote: The AI caught two subscriptions I forgot I was paying for. It paid for itself before launch.
two.name: Daniyar T.

three.quote: Budgeting used to stress me out. Now I get a friendly nudge and I'm back on track in seconds.
three.name: Sofia K.

pricing.title: Simple pricing, waitlist perks
pricing.subtitle: Join now and lock in early-access pricing for life.

free.name: Starter
free.desc: Everything you need to see where your money goes.

pro.name: Aura Pro
pro.desc: The full AI copilot for people serious about saving.

family.name: Family
family.desc: Shared finances for the whole household.

faq.title: Questions, answered
faq.subtitle: Everything else you might be wondering.

when.a: We're rolling out to the waitlist in batches. Join now and you'll be among the first invited — earlier sign-ups get in sooner.

safe.a: Yes. Connections are read-only and protected with 256-bit encryption. We never store your bank credentials and never sell your data.

cost.a: There's a free Starter plan forever. Waitlist members who upgrade lock in early-access pricing that never goes up.

banks.a: We support thousands of banks and cards through our secure providers, with new institutions added every week.

leave.a: Anytime, in one click. We'll only email you about your spot and the launch — nothing else.

cta.title: Take your money off manual
cta.subtitle: Join thousands getting early access to the AI budgeting app that actually does the work.
cta.note: No spam. Just your invite when it's ready.

waitlist.successNote: We'll email you the moment your invite is ready.
waitlist.invalid: Please enter a valid email address.

footer.disclaimer: Kontent Aura is a demo landing page. Not a financial institution.
